channel.title: Hello Sounds - Global Onomatopoeia Library
channel.description: Explore how the world speaks! Discover 90+ onomatopoeia sounds in 15 languages with AI-powered native pronunciations.

item.title: Hello Sounds - Home
item.description: Interactive global onomatopoeia library. Hear native AI pronunciations of 90+ sounds from 15 countries.

item.title: About Hello Sounds
item.description: Discover the mission behind Hello Sounds. AI-powered global onomatopoeia for language learners and children.

item.title: Contact Us - Hello Sounds
item.description: Get in touch with the Hello Sounds team. Report bugs, suggest sounds, or share feedback.

item.title: Quiz Mode - Hello Sounds
item.description: Test your ear! Listen to onomatopoeia from around the world and guess the country in Quiz Mode.

item.title: 🐾 Animal Sounds Around the World
item.description: How does a dog bark in Korea, Japan, Turkey, and 12 other countries? Explore animal onomatopoeia including dogs, cats, roosters, cows, and more.

item.title: 🚗 Object Sounds Around the World
item.description: How do cars, clocks, bells, and cameras sound in different languages? Discover object onomatopoeia from 15 countries.

item.title: 👤 Human Sounds Around the World
item.description: How do people laugh, cry, and sneeze in different cultures? Explore human sound expressions from 15 countries.

item.title: 🌿 Nature Sounds Around the World
item.description: How do rain, wind, thunder, and waves sound in different languages? Discover nature onomatopoeia from 15 countries.

item.title: 🎵 Music Sounds Around the World
item.description: How do drums, guitars, pianos, and trumpets sound in different cultures? Explore music onomatopoeia from 15 countries.

item.title: 🏙️ City Sounds Around the World
item.description: How do sirens, trains, and motorcycles sound in different languages? Discover city onomatopoeia from 15 countries.

item.title: 🇰🇷 한국어로 듣는 세계의 소리
item.description: 전 세계 15개국의 의성어를 한국어로 탐색하세요. AI 네이티브 발음으로 동물, 자연, 음악, 도시의 소리를 들어보세요.

item.title: 🇯🇵 日本語で聞く世界の音
item.description: 世界15カ国のオノマトペを日本語で探索しましょう。AI技術による本格的な現地発音で動物、自然、音楽の音を聞いてみてください。

item.title: 🇪🇸 Sonidos del Mundo en Español
item.description: Explora onomatopeyas de 15 países en español. Escucha sonidos de animales, naturaleza, música y ciudades con pronunciación nativa de IA.
